summary: Satoru Gojo is one of the main protagonists of the Jujutsu Kaisen series. He is a Special Grade Jujutsu Sorcerer who is widely recognized as the strongest of the Modern Era.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Netflix)
summary: Monkey D. Luffy, known as 'Straw Hat Luffy', is the main protagonist of the manga, anime, and now live action television series, One Piece.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Pre-Timeskip)
summary: Monkey D. Luffy, known as 'Straw Hat Luffy', is the main protagonist of the manga and anime, One Piece. He's the son of Monkey D. Dragon, a revolutionary considered “The World’s Most Dangerous Criminal”; the grandson of [[Monkey D. Garp]], a powerful Marine Vice-Admiral who had cornered the [[Gol D. Roger|late Pirate King]] himself on several occasions; the sworn brother of late 'Fire Fist' [[Portgas D. Ace]] and Revolutionary chief of staff [[Sabo]]; and the foster son of Curly Dadan. He seeks to find One Piece and become the Pirate King; to accomplish this, he founded the Straw Hat Pirates and set out on the high seas at age 17 in search of the elusive treasure, beginning a series of increasingly odd and dangerous adventures.

name: Monkey D. Luffy (Emperor)
summary: Monkey D. Luffy, known as 'Straw Hat Luffy', is the main protagonist of the manga and anime, One Piece. He's the son of Monkey D. Dragon, a revolutionary considered 'The World's Most Dangerous Criminal'...

name: Monkey D. Garp
summary: Monkey D. Garp is a Marine vice admiral. He is the father of Monkey D. Dragon, the grandfather of [[Monkey D. Luffy]], and the adoptive grandfather of [[Portgas D. Ace]].

name: Eren Yeager

abilities: War Hammer Titan (after eating Lara Tybur)

summary: The main protagonist of Attack on Titan. He lived a peaceful life in Shiganshina District with his now late parents Grisha and Carla Yeager, and his childhood friend Mikasa Ackerman, until the town was destroyed by Titans during the fall of Wall Maria.

name: Roronoa Zoro (Netflix)
summary: Roronoa Zoro, also known by his epithet “Pirate Hunter”, is the premier swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates.

name: Roronoa Zoro (Post-Timeskip)
summary: Roronoa Zoro, also known by his former epithet of 'Pirate Hunter' after the Raid he's new title of 'The King of Hell', is the premier swordsman of the Straw Hat Pirates and a member of the Monster Trio. Recruited as a mildly notorious bounty hunter (hence his “Pirate Hunter” moniker), he is a monstrously powerful man who doesn't wield the power of a Devil Fruit, using a unique Three-Sword Style in a battle of his own creation, wielding a sword in each hand along with one in the mouth.

summary: Lelouch Lamperouge is a student at Ashford Academy in Tokyo Settlement, and the Vice President of the student council. He lives with and cares for his younger sister, Nunnally. Truthfully, he is Lelouch vi Britannia, the eleventh prince of the Holy Britannian Empire, who went missing in Japan with his younger sister and was presumed dead.

summary: Enigmatic leader of Public Safety Devil Extermination Special Division 4 as well as the Chief Cabinet Secretary's Personal Devil Hunter. Her true identity is later revealed to be that of the Control Devil, the fear of control and domination embodied who seeks to utilize the Chainsaw Devil's power to create a new world eradicated of anything she considers a problem and where she could stand equal with others.

name: Frieren

stats.tier: 10-B (physically), at least Low 7-C with magic, 7-B with Environmental Destruction

summary: Frieren is the primary protagonist of Frieren: Beyond Journey's End. Eighty years after defeating the demon king as a member of the hero Himmel's party, she travels the world to discover new magic while visiting places where her party traveled during their 10 year voyage to defeat the demon king, in an attempt to relive those past memories, learn more about her past comrades, and discover why such a small time period of her life could have left such a profound impact on her.

name: Frieren: Beyond Journey's End

name: Rintarou Okabe
summary: Self-proclaimed mad scientist and the main protagonist of Steins;Gate.

name: Kaguya Houraisan
summary: Former princess of the Moon, banished to Earth for consuming the Hourai Elixir to become immortal. She dwelt among humans and eventually grew to love her new home.

name: Light Yagami
summary: A high-achieving student with a strong sense of justice, Light discovers the Death Note and, accompanied by the watchful Shinigami Ryuk, embarks on a mission to rid the world of evil by eliminating criminals.

name: Light Turner
summary: Light Turner is the main protagonist of the 2017 Netflix remake film, Death Note, which is very loosely based on the anime and manga series of the same name by Tsugumi Ohba and Takeshi Obata. He is a teenage student who finds a Death Note and decides to use it to kill criminals and appoints himself the god of a clean world.

name: Mao Mao

stats.tier: Low 7-C (higher with Statistics Amplification), High 7-C as a giant | At least Low 7-C

summary: Mao Mao, originally a band of rogue heroes trying to defeat the villainous Sky Pirates, later found out the Ruby Pure Heart is a mystical artifact wanted by those seeking glory and recruiting a young girl wishing to be a hero like him named Adorabat. Now defender of the valley, he fights to uphold justice and one day become a legend known and beloved by all.
